title: Bountiful Villager
description: A Bountiful add-on that add a new villager profession and new structure.
body:
This Mod add a new villager type: receptionist. **(bountiful\_npc:receptionist)**

The POI of receptionist is the **Bounty Board** block.

When you interact with the receptionist, it's equal to interact with the bounty board.

If you installed [P1nero's Dialog Lib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/p1neros-dialogue-lib) , the receptionist will have a dailog.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_28782b5b-42e4-4d26-b35a-106fbb90406b.png)

If you hold a bounty or a decree item, there will be a button for submit.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_ae3ee7b5-06fe-42c3-aeca-4ce2410ed0e9.png)

 

Now every village will spawn one Adventurers' Guild, compat with **Trek**, **Towns and Towers**

(Configurable by **[lithostitched api](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lithostitched)**)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_bf331063-5042-42e9-93bb-f25ad983ccb3.png)
